name: JUTE CORE TRAVEL CABLE - 10 CONDUCTOR ROVER MULTICABLE
description: 10-conductor jute core traveling cable for elevator car communication and control. Jute core provides flexibility and dampens oscillation during operation.

name: KINDORF SPRING NUT ZINC 3/8''
description: Kindorf spring nut (3/8) for strut channel. Spring-loaded design snaps into strut slots for quick, tool-free positioning before tightening.

name: KINDORF SPRING NUT ZINC 5/16''
description: Kindorf spring nut (5/16) for strut channel. Spring-loaded design snaps into strut slots for quick, tool-free positioning before tightening.

name: LED TEMPORARY HANGING WORK LIGHT 100W
description: 100W LED temporary hanging work light for illuminating elevator pits and hoistways during installation. Bright, energy-efficient, and durable.

name: LIFELINE 3/8'' X 150FT
description: 3/8" × 150 ft lifeline for personal fall protection in elevator hoistways and on top of cars. Meets OSHA fall arrest requirements.

name: LIGHT BULB CAGE METAL (METAL LAMP GUARD)
description: Metal lamp guard (bulb cage) for protecting incandescent and LED bulbs in elevator pits and machine rooms from accidental breakage.

name: LOAD WEIGHING EMCO MODEL VK3V-110
description: EMCO VK3V-110 load weighing device for elevator cars. Measures car load to optimize dispatching, prevent overloads, and enable releveling.

name: LOAD WEIGHING SWK ROPE SENSORS
description: SWK rope sensor load weighing system for traction elevators. Measures suspension rope tension for accurate load detection without modifying the car structure.

name: MAGNETIC LEVEL 1FT
description: 1 ft magnetic level for checking plumb and level on elevator guide rails, brackets, and sill angles. Magnetic base holds to steel surfaces hands-free.

name: MAGNETIC LEVEL 2FT
description: 2 ft magnetic level for verifying plumb of elevator guide rail sections and door frames. Strong magnetic base adheres to steel without clamps.

name: MAGNETIC LEVEL 3FT
description: 3 ft magnetic level for checking hoistway door sill alignment and guide rail plumb over longer spans.

name: MAGNETIC LEVEL 4FT
description: 4 ft magnetic level for verifying plumb across multiple elevator guide rail sections and landing door headers.

name: MAGNETIC LEVEL 6FT
description: 6 ft magnetic level for long-span plumb checks on elevator guide rail runs and tall sill angles. Ideal for initial hoistway layout.

name: MASTER LOCK BRASS COMBINATION LOCK
description: Brass combination padlock for securing elevator machine room doors, pit access hatches, and lockout/tagout procedures during service.

name: METAL HD/HSS BLACK OXIDE & GOLD DRILL BIT 1/2"
description: Black oxide HSS drill bit (1/2") for general metal drilling in elevator brackets, straps, and steel plates.

name: METAL HD/HSS COBALT DRILL BIT 3/4"

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 10 CONDUCTOR
description: 10-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 14 CONDUCTOR
description: 14-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 24 CONDUCTOR
description: 24-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 30 CONDUCTOR
description: 30-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 37 CONDUCTOR
description: 37-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 42 CONDUCTOR
description: 42-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: MULTI CABLE/HOISTWAY CABLE 61 CONDUCTOR
description: 61-conductor hoistway traveling cable for elevator car wiring. Designed to withstand continuous flexing, oil exposure, and the demanding conditions of elevator shafts.

name: NITRILE WORK GLOVES CUT RESISTANT ANSI A1
description: Cut-resistant nitrile work gloves (ANSI A1) for handling conduit, wire rope, and sheet metal during elevator installation. Improves grip and protects hands.

name: PERMANENT MARKERS FINE TIP
description: Fine-tip permanent markers for labeling wire conductors, conduit runs, terminals, and components during elevator installation and maintenance.

name: PIANO WIRE 0.029 (ROLL 1320')
description: Piano wire 0.029" gauge, 1,320 ft roll. Used as a plumb line for aligning elevator guide rails and checking hoistway plumb during installation.

name: PIANO WIRE 0.029 (ROLL 2200 FT)
description: Piano wire 0.029" gauge, 2,200 ft roll. Extended-length roll for tall hoistway plumbing and alignment on high-rise elevator installations.

name: PLASTIC ANCHOR KIT 10-12 X 1 1/4
description: Plastic anchor kit for light-duty fastening into concrete and masonry. Used for mounting cable trays, conduit straps, and small fixtures in elevator rooms.

name: PLUMB BOB (16OZ)
description: 16 oz plumb bob for establishing true vertical reference lines when aligning elevator guide rails, templates, and hoistway layout.

name: PLUMB BOB (8OZ)
description: 8 oz plumb bob for elevator guide rail and template alignment. Lighter weight allows use in standard hoistway heights with minimal swing.

name: RECIPROCATING SAW BLADE METAL CUTTING 6'' (SAWZALL BLADE)
description: Metal-cutting reciprocating saw blade (6) (Sawzall-compatible). For cutting conduit, strut, and structural steel during elevator installation.

name: RECIPROCATING SAW BLADE METAL CUTTING 9'' (SAWZALL BLADE)
description: Metal-cutting reciprocating saw blade (9) (Sawzall-compatible). For cutting conduit, strut, and structural steel during elevator installation.

name: RECIPROCATING SAW BLADE WOOD CUTTING 6'' (SAWZALL BLADE)
description: Wood-cutting reciprocating saw blade (6) (Sawzall-compatible). For cutting blocking, sills, and wooden framing in elevator pit and machine room work.

name: RECIPROCATING SAW BLADE WOOD CUTTING 9'' (SAWZALL BLADE)
description: Wood-cutting reciprocating saw blade (9) (Sawzall-compatible). For cutting blocking, sills, and wooden framing in elevator pit and machine room work.

name: ROLLER PLUNGER SAFETY LIMIT SWITCH
description: Roller plunger safety limit switch for elevator hoistway position detection. Activates on contact with a cam for precise stopping and slowdown zones.

name: ROLLER SAFETY SUNS LIMIT SWITCH
description: Roller-type safety limit switch (SUNS) for elevator travel limit detection. Provides reliable open/close contacts for safety circuit interruption.

name: S3-1370L NC LIMIT SWITCH
description: S3-1370L normally-closed limit switch for elevator pit and overhead travel limiting. Complies with ASME A17.1 safety code requirements.

name: SAFETY GLASSES
description: ANSI Z87.1-rated safety glasses for eye protection during elevator installation and maintenance. Lightweight frame with impact-resistant polycarbonate lenses.

name: SAFETY HARNESS
description: Full-body safety harness for fall protection when working on top of elevator cars, in hoistways, and on scaffolding. Meets ANSI/ASSE Z359 standards.

name: SAFETY INTERLOCK PULL OUT SWITCH
description: Safety interlock pull-out switch for elevator hoistway door and gate interlocks. Interrupts the safety circuit when the door is opened during operation.

name: SELF DRILLING SCREW FLAT PHILLIPS HEAD 10 X 3/4"
description: Flat-head Phillips self-drilling screw, 10×3/4". Drills its own pilot hole in sheet metal — ideal for attaching brackets and panels in elevator rooms.

name: SELF DRILLING SCREW HEX HEAD 10 X 3/4"
description: Hex-head self-drilling screw, 10×3/4". For fast attachment to steel framing and strut without pre-drilling. Used in elevator panel and bracket installation.

name: SIMPLE GREEN CLEANER
description: Simple Green all-purpose cleaner for degreasing elevator mechanical components, machine room floors, and equipment surfaces before inspection or paint.

name: SLING STRAP YELLOW 2" X 6' LIFT SLING
description: Polyester lift sling (2" X 6) for rigging elevator equipment during installation. Soft loop design protects finished surfaces from damage.

name: SLING STRAP YELLOW 2'' X 8'' LIFT SLING
description: Polyester lift sling (2) for rigging elevator equipment during installation. Soft loop design protects finished surfaces from damage.

name: SLING STRAP YELLOW 3" X 6' LIFT SLING
description: Polyester lift sling (3" X 6) for rigging elevator equipment during installation. Soft loop design protects finished surfaces from damage.

name: SLING STRAP YELLOW 3" X 6' LIFT SLING 2-PLY POLYESTER
description: 2-ply polyester lift sling (3" X 6) for rigging heavy elevator components including motors, machines, and car frames. Rated for overhead lifting.

name: SPRAY PAINT ORANGE (RUST OLEUM 2X ULTRA COVER 12OZ)
description: Rust-Oleum 2X Ultra Cover orange spray paint, 12 oz. For marking elevator components and touch-up painting of guide rail brackets and structural steel.

name: SPRAY PAINT YELLOW
description: Yellow spray paint for marking safety zones, pit floors, and elevator equipment per ASME and OSHA color-coding standards.

name: STENCIL NUMBERS AND LETTERS 6IN
description: 6" stencil set (letters and numbers) for marking elevator floors, equipment, and hoistway walls with floor designations and safety labels.

name: STRUT CHANNEL 1 1/2'' x 1 1/2''
description: 1-1/2" × 1-1/2" steel strut channel (Unistrut-style) for mounting conduit, equipment, and cable trays in elevator hoistways.

name: STRUT CHANNEL 3/4'' x 1 1/2"
description: 1-1/2" × 1-1/2" steel strut channel (Unistrut-style) for mounting conduit, equipment, and cable trays in elevator hoistways.

name: TEMPORARY RUN STATION/ TEMPORARY RUN BOX BUTTON
description: Temporary run station / run box for elevator inspection and maintenance operation. Provides UP, DOWN, and STOP controls for top-of-car and pit service.

name: TOGGLE PIT SWITCH
description: Pit stop toggle switch for interrupting the elevator safety circuit from the pit. Required by ASME A17.1 for safe access during pit maintenance.

name: TRAVELING CABLE TCSX57 STEEL CORE COMBINATION
description: TCSX57 steel core combination traveling cable for elevator applications. Steel core provides superior support and reduces stretch for high-rise installations.

name: TRIPLE TAP GFCI RECEPTACLE 3FT EXTENSION
description: 3-outlet GFCI extension cord, 3 ft. Provides ground-fault protected power on elevator car tops and in pits where OSHA requires GFCI protection.

name: TROUGH 90 ELBOW TYPE C
description: Type C 90° trough elbow for changing direction in metal wire trough runs. Provides clean, organized cable routing.

name: TROUGH 90 ELBOW TYPE D

name: TROUGH TEE TYPE D
description: Type D trough tee fitting for splitting or branching wire trough runs. Essential for multi-direction cable distribution.

name: TROUGH W/COVER 2 1/2" X 4'' X 120''
description: Steel wire trough with cover for protecting and organizing multiple conductors in elevator machine rooms and hoistways.

description: Tungsten carbide tipped hole cutter (1) for drilling through hard materials including stainless steel panels and elevator sill angles.

description: WD-40 multi-use spray lubricant, 12 oz. For loosening seized bolts, displacing moisture, and protecting metal elevator components from rust during installation.
